title: Device Settings - Check if setting's value persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Device settings values do not persist after closing settings tab, navigating to home page, or killing and restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen.
3. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Change values in all available settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Audio Settings, Notifications).
5. Close the settings tab (e.g., tap back or swipe away), then reopen Device Settings → [Device Name].
6. Verify that all previously changed values are still set.
7. Navigate back to the Home screen, then tap [Device Name] again to return to Device Settings.
8. Verify that all previously changed values are still set.
9. Kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (force stop / swipe from recent apps).
10. Restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
11. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
12. Verify that all previously changed values are still set.
expected: All device settings values persist after closing the settings tab, navigating back to the Home screen, and after killing and restarting the app.
